btn_start_studio: Go to Studio to Start Planning
landing_subtitle: Next-Gen Travel Tool / Data-Driven Itinerary Planning
landing_title:
Transform Any Idea into
a Perfect Executable Itinerary
landing_desc: Say goodbye to tedious planning. Just provide your confirmed flight and accommodation details, and our top-notch AI will tailor a precise and perfectly routed itinerary for you.
landing_bonus: No Credit Card Required • Register and Get 6 Experience Points
how_title:
How to Use HKfirstclick AI
for Creation
how_desc: Transform your travel inspiration into a precise structured itinerary list in just three simple steps.
step1_desc: Activate your personal studio and input your departure, destination, and dates through a structured panel to ensure data accuracy.
step2_desc: Our AI will use your exact accommodation location as the starting point each day, calculating travel time and the best routes to ensure not a minute of your journey is wasted.
step3_desc: Get a professional track-style itinerary list in seconds. You can make local modifications and export to Google Maps with one click once confirmed.
faq_q1: What is the HKfirstclick AI Itinerary Conversion Tool?
faq_a1: HKfirstclick allows you to input your destination, flight times, and hotel address, and uses AI to convert them into a highly feasible, time-precise itinerary.
faq_q2: How does the text-to-itinerary AI work?
faq_a2: Our system analyzes your specific needs, dietary restrictions, and exact flight schedules to calculate the most reasonable point-to-point daily routes for you.
faq_q3: Can I modify the generated itinerary?
faq_a3: Of course. The system supports conversational and manual modifications. When you adjust the itinerary, the AI will automatically recalculate and match suitable flights and accommodations for you.
faq_q4: Is the generated itinerary time accurate?
faq_a4: Yes! Just provide your exact flight departure and arrival times and hotel address, and the AI will automatically estimate reasonable buffer times for airport clearance and daily commuting.
faq_q5: Which plans include unlimited export permissions?
faq_a5: Pro Member enjoys unlimited PDF and Google Maps export permissions. Casual users need to deduct 1 Credit per export.
ws_desc: Please fill in your flight and accommodation information below, and the AI will calculate the best daily routes and generate a professional itinerary for you.
pref_desc: Tell us your travel preferences and budget, and we will generate a professional-grade exclusive itinerary for you.
q2_title: What is the core purpose of this trip? (Multiple selections allowed)
q3_title: What is your overall budget approximately?
q4_ph: For example: We have elderly companions, please arrange wheelchair-accessible hotels...
gen_title: AI is Deeply Arranging Your Itinerary...
gen_desc: Matching suitable flight and accommodation data based on your preferences and budget.
err_empty: Please complete all required fields (departure, destination, and dates)
err_date: Return date cannot be earlier than departure date, please reselect
err_fill_date: Please fill in the complete date
plan_night: Skyline Night View / Light Bar Drink
cat_desc: See the perfect itineraries our AI has successfully generated for other travelers and inspire your next adventure.
price_desc: Includes validity regulations, please choose the itinerary points plan that suits you best.
tier1_desc: Risk-free experience of AI magic, get a structured inspiration list for your first journey.
tier2_desc: Designed for a single perfect holiday, unlock advanced AI fine-tuning, and say goodbye to all planning anxiety.
tier3_desc: The first choice for travel enthusiasts. A year-round exclusive AI advisor, enjoy the top privileges.
tier4_desc: The most flexible point replenishment plan, ensuring your travel inspiration never runs dry, available for purchase anytime.
tier4_feature2: Up to One Year of Peace of Mind Backup Period
tier4_feature3: Inherit Your Current Account's Generation Speed
rule_1_p3_v: Member Identity (Purchased Pass/Yearly) Unlimited Free; Casual Identity (Free/Only Purchased Top-up) -1 Point per Export
rule_2_p1_v: Covers the complete travel planning cycle, giving you 180 days to slowly refine and perfect your holiday itinerary.
rule_2_p2_v: Super long 365-day validity, ensuring you always have point support when you need to modify or add planning, worry-free.
rule_2_p3_v: Designed for those who love exploration, inspiring you anytime within a year, ready to go, accompanying you around the world.
rule_3_intro: Planning a longer adventure? Itineraries up to 10 days are covered by the standard 5-credit cost. For trips beyond 10 days, each additional day is charged at just 1 extra credit — so you can explore as long as you like, at a fair price.
rule_3_example: Example: A 10-day itinerary costs 5 credits. A 13-day itinerary costs 8 credits (5 base + 3 extra days).
login_desc: Sync all your itineraries and exclusive points
map_desc: Visualize your itinerary trajectory. This feature is currently only available for Pro members to preview.
legal_placeholder: This is a sample page content. Complete legal terms or detailed explanations will be filled in upon official launch.
banner_title: Haven't Booked Flights and Hotels Yet?
banner_desc: We recommend completing your bookings first! With exact flight times and hotel addresses, AI can accurately calculate point-to-point travel distances to create a time-efficient perfect itinerary.
input_hotel_ph: For example: APA Hotel Shinjuku Gyoen / Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo...
q_diet_ph: For example: No beef, someone is vegetarian, must try Ichiran Ramen...
ws_tweak_desc: Don't like a certain attraction? Want to wake up later? Tell AI to edit your exclusive itinerary.
ws_tweak_ph: For example: Change the first afternoon's itinerary to an accessible attraction suitable for the elderly, want seafood for dinner...
ws_flight_warn: It is recommended to arrive at the airport at least 2 hours early
ws_budget_est: Total Estimated Cost (Flights + Accommodation + Local Activities)
ws_ready_desc: Please fill in your flight and accommodation information on the panel, and our top AI will create a perfect adventure for you.
ws_access_desc: Prioritise flat routes and easy access
ws_must_ph: e.g., Booked Michelin restaurant Wednesday noon, must visit Kiyomizudera...
ws_loading_title: AI is planning your exclusive itinerary
ws_loading_desc: Fetching real-time flight and attraction data from global databases, please wait about 10-15 seconds...
map_body: We are developing an interactive global travel map. Soon you'll be able to visually drag, edit and visualise your AI itinerary on the map. Stay tuned!
cat_body: Explore top AI itineraries shared by travellers worldwide. We are building an exclusive inspiration library so you can copy and rewrite amazing trips with one click.

map_subtitle_page: Watch your generated AI itineraries come to life on our interactive global tracking map.
privacy_collect_intro: To provide better service, we collect the following necessary information when you log in using your Google account:
privacy_usage_intro: The collected data is only used for the following specific purposes:
privacy_usage_item1: Creating and managing your user account
privacy_usage_item3: Processing secure payment transactions via Stripe
privacy_protect_desc: We value your privacy and promise never to sell or provide your personal data to any third party for advertising or marketing activities. All data processing complies with modern secure communication standards.
privacy_contact_intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
price_payment_notice: One-time payment, no hidden subscriptions. Local currency prices are for reference only — actual charges will be in USD.

ws_who_travel: Who is coming and how do we travel?
ws_diet_must: Any dietary restrictions or absolute must-haves?
mytrips_desc: View, manage, and iterate on your past AI-generated travel plans.
mytrips_empty_desc: You haven't generated any itineraries yet. Let's create your first adventure!
landing_cta_desc: Clone this itinerary template to your workspace, adjust the dates, and let our AI personalize the perfect schedule for you.
landing_detailed_desc: We are preparing a fully detailed hour-by-hour schedule for this destination. Check back later!
cat_explore_desc: Discover other world-class cities and their perfectly planned itineraries.
cat_cta_desc: Clone this template to your workspace, adjust the dates, and let our AI personalize the perfect schedule for you.
cat_faq_q1: How many days should I spend in {cityName}?
cat_faq_a1: We recommend {days} days for {cityName}. This itinerary covers {days} full days of sightseeing, giving you enough time to explore the top attractions without feeling rushed.
cat_faq_q2: What are the must-see spots in {cityName}?
cat_faq_a2: The top spots in {cityName} include {spots}. This itinerary visits all of these across {days} days.
cat_faq_q3: Is this {cityName} itinerary suitable for first-time visitors?
cat_faq_a3: Yes! This AI-generated {cityName} itinerary is designed for first-time visitors. It covers the most iconic landmarks and local experiences, with practical tips for each stop.
cat_faq_a4: Absolutely. Click the 'Generate AI Itinerary' button to clone this template to your workspace. You can then adjust dates, swap activities, add your flight details, and let the AI re-optimize the schedule for you.
cat_faq_q5: What is the best time to visit {cityName}?
cat_faq_a5: The best time to visit {cityName} depends on your preferences. Spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant weather for sightseeing. Check our full itinerary for seasonal tips at each attraction.
catalog_intro: Browse our AI-generated day-by-day travel guides for top destinations worldwide. Each itinerary includes curated spots and practical tips — tailored to your language and travel style.

aff_disclosure_desc: By joining, you agree to clearly disclose your affiliate relationship in ALL promotional content. You must include a statement such as:

aff_payout_desc: We pay out via PayPal only. Set your PayPal email and the minimum balance you want to accumulate before receiving a payout.
